title: Der größte Gauner des Jahrhunderts
writer: Max Obal, Hans Rameau, Ludwig von Wohl
actors: Luciano Albertini, Gritta Ley, Hans Albers
plot: The adventurer Gino Gadari is looking for a new challenge when he run into the soave Liane Serano. She tells him about her uncle, the banker Alberto Dorna who has fallen into the clutches of a well known card-cheat and impostor. G...
